 Your space mission: collect all 4 Golden Coins!

Denys, you already know: the Super Mario Galaxy Movie Meal was recently launched.

Your mission?

*Collect all 4 Golden Coins** faster than light вАУ there's one in every *Super Mario Galaxy Movie Meal* box.

 *Receive 1 of 4 Golden Coins 1 (randomly chosen) with the purchase of a Super Mario Galaxy Movie Meal, consisting of one of the participating Medium McMenus ¬Ѓ. Choose one of the following options: a Filet-O-Fish ¬Ѓ , or 6 Chicken McNuggets ¬Ѓ , or a Big Mac ¬Ѓ , or a McChicken ¬Ѓ , or a Royal Crispy Bacon, or a Veggie Deluxe. Offer valid from 31/03/2026 to 28/04/2026, or while stocks last, in all participating restaurants in Belgium.
